title: Chain 1/8: Call to Reserve
scene: 周五下午，你打电话预订今晚的餐厅座位。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 红叶餐厅，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Maple Leaf Restaurant. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想订今晚七点半，两位。
turns.en: I'd like a table for two tonight at seven thirty.
Name? Any seating preference?

turns.cn: 张伟，靠窗最好，有花生过敏。
turns.en: Zhang Wei. Window if possible. Peanut allergy.
Noted. We'll hold it for fifteen minutes.
Thank you. See you tonight.

title: Chain 2/8: Arrive and Be Seated
scene: 七点二十五，你和朋友到了餐厅门口。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 晚上好，预订了七点半，张伟，两位。
turns.en: Good evening. Reservation at seven thirty, Zhang Wei, party of two.

turns.cn: 欢迎光临，靠窗准备好了，请跟我来。
turns.en: Welcome. Your window table is ready. Right this way.
Great. Could we get water first?
Of course. Your server will be right over.
May we see the menus?
They're on the table. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chain 3/8: Order Food
scene: 服务员来点餐，你和朋友各点一份。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 晚上好，准备好点餐了吗？
turns.en: Good evening. Ready to order?

turns.cn: 我要烤三文鱼，配菜换西兰花。
turns.en: I'll have grilled salmon. Swap the sides for broccoli.
Anything to drink?
Lemonade, light ice.
Would you like the bread basket?
Yes, please.

title: Chain 4/8: Confirm Allergy
scene: 你再次跟服务员确认花生过敏事项。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 提醒一下，我对花生严重过敏。
turns.en: Just a reminder, I'm severely allergic to peanuts.

turns.cn: 预订里看到了，厨房会分开处理。
turns.en: I see it on the reservation. The kitchen will handle it separately.
The sauces are peanut-free too?

turns.cn: 三文鱼配柠檬黄油酱，安全的。
turns.en: The salmon comes with lemon butter. That's safe.
Perfect. Thanks for checking.

turns.cn: 我会在订单上特别标注。
turns.en: I'll flag it on the ticket.

title: Chain 5/8: Food Is Slow
scene: 等了二十五分钟主菜还没来，你礼貌询问。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我们的主菜大概还要多久？
turns.en: Excuse me, how much longer on our mains?

turns.cn: 厨房有点忙，大约五分钟。
turns.en: The kitchen's backed up. About five more minutes.
No problem. Could we get more water?
Right away. Sorry for the wait.
It's okay. We understand.

title: Chain 6/8: Wrong Side Dish
scene: 主菜来了，但你的配菜不是西兰花。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 抱歉，我点的是西兰花，不是薯条。
turns.en: Sorry, I asked for broccoli, not fries.
My apologies. I'll swap it right away.

turns.cn: 三文鱼看起来很好，不用重做。
turns.en: The salmon looks great. No need to remake that.
Thank you. Two minutes.
Okay.

title: Chain 7/8: Pay the Bill
scene: 用餐结束，你准备结账。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.en: Could we have the check, please?

turns.cn: 一共六十八块，含小费吗？
turns.en: That's sixty-eight dollars. Is tip included?

turns.cn: 不含的话我付百分之十八小费。
turns.en: If not, I'll add eighteen percent.
Tip isn't included. You can pay here.
Card, please. Service was excellent.
Thank you for coming!

title: Chain 8/8: Leave a Review
scene: 走出餐厅，朋友问你今晚怎么样。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.en: How was it? Would you come back?

turns.cn: 鱼不错，就是上菜慢了点。
turns.en: The fish was good. Just a bit slow.

turns.cn: 我帮你在 Google 写个好评？
turns.en: Want me to leave a good Google review?

turns.cn: 行，记得提一下过敏处理得好。
turns.en: Sure. Mention they handled the allergy well.
Try a new place next week?
Sounds good. You book it.
